tags: ticker: real time ticker with 24 hour price&vol statistics
get.description:
### symbol 规则
- bitget 和 binance 交易所, spot 和 um 都是 baseAsset + quoteAsset 组成, 如 BTCUSDT
- binance cm 合约是 baseAsset  + 'USD' 组成，同时叫后缀 _PERP 如 BTCUSDUSD_PERP
- bitget  cm 合约是 baseAsset  + 'USD' 组成, 如 BTCUSD
- okx 交易所 spot 由 baseAsset + '-' + quoteAsset 组成, 如 BTC-USDT
- okx 交易所 合约 由 baseAsset + '-' + quoteAsset 加 -SWAP 后缀 组成, 如 BTC-USDT-SWAP(U本位) 或 BTC-USD-SWAP(币本位)

Query stock basic information

get.description:
Individual stock financial information API

Purpose: Retrieve financial data of individual stocks (balance sheet, income statement, cash flow statement, etc.) for building profitability quality, growth, and valuation factors (e.g., ROE, revenue growth rate, P/E ratio, etc.)

parameters.name: symbol

schema.description: List of stock tickers to query. Use standard ticker symbols (e.g. 'AAPL', 'MSFT'). If empty, the server may reject the request or apply a default.
schema.title: Symbol

parameters.description: List of stock tickers to query. Use standard ticker symbols (e.g. 'AAPL', 'MSFT'). If empty, the server may reject the request or apply a default.

parameters.name: lookback

schema.description:
Relative lookback window from today (inclusive), mutually exclusive with `start_date`.
Format: '<number><unit>' where unit ∈ { 'd', 'm', 'y' }.
Examples:
  - '5y'  → last 5 years (适用于年报 / TTM 最近5年)
  - '11m' → last 11 months (接近最近12个月 / TTM)
  - '30d' → last 30 days
If neither `lookback` nor `start_date` is provided, the server applies a default lookback (e.g. '5y').
schema.title: Lookback

parameters.description:
Relative lookback window from today (inclusive), mutually exclusive with `start_date`.
Format: '<number><unit>' where unit ∈ { 'd', 'm', 'y' }.
Examples:
  - '5y'  → last 5 years (适用于年报 / TTM 最近5年)
  - '11m' → last 11 months (接近最近12个月 / TTM)
  - '30d' → last 30 days
If neither `lookback` nor `start_date` is provided, the server applies a default lookback (e.g. '5y').

parameters.name: end_date

schema.description:
Absolute end date (inclusive) in 'YYYY-MM-DD' format.
Used only when `start_date` is provided.
If omitted, defaults to today's date.
对于“最近几年/最近几个TTM”的语义，通常不需要显式设置。
schema.title: End Date

parameters.description:
Absolute end date (inclusive) in 'YYYY-MM-DD' format.
Used only when `start_date` is provided.
If omitted, defaults to today's date.
对于“最近几年/最近几个TTM”的语义，通常不需要显式设置。

- 美股/日股/韩国/英国/德国历史日线 都是前复权了的价格，故价格调整因子忽略
- 港股/深圳/上海 根据价格调整因子，可计算 前复权/后复权/不复权价格

Query stock daily K-line cross sectional without price adjust within a given date range
-

股票市场估值对比
- simple_avg_pe: 简单平均市盈率,统计pe在 0-300范围内的股票的平均市盈率
- weighted_avg_pe: 市值加权平均市盈率 = Σ(市值) / Σ(市值/PE) = 有效市值总和 / 总利润

不同市场行业估值对比
- simple_avg_pe: 简单平均市盈率,统计pe在 0-300范围内的股票的平均市盈率
- simple_avg_pe_all: 简单平均市盈率,统计pe>0的股票的平均市盈率
- weighted_avg_pe: 市值加权平均市盈率 = Σ(市值) / Σ(市值/PE) = 有效市值总和 / 总利润

Query strategy introduction information

Purpose: Understand built-in classic strategy labels and basic logic (quality, dividend, value, growth, momentum, low volatility, etc.) to align strategy style naming

Query strategy performance

Purpose: Reference which classic strategy performs better in similar market environments, understand different strategy performances in historical contexts to help select the main style for the current sector
Retrieve paginated external events from all supported sources
Retrieve one-hop graph nodes related to a unified external event.

Lists sector info records filtered by any combination of ``name``, ``name_alias``,
``level``, ``parent_id``, or ``sensitivity``.

When ``tree`` is ``true``, returns a nested parent-child hierarchy and automatically
pulls in all descendants of every matched node even when those descendants do not
satisfy the filter. When ``tree`` is ``false``, returns a flat list with no
``children`` field. Soft-deleted records (``is_deleted=1``) are always excluded.

post.description:
Creates one or more sector info records in a single request.

Accepts a list of sector definitions under `items`. Each item requires `name`
and `level`; `parent_id` must reference an existing sector when specified.
Returns the count of successfully created records.

get.description:
Lists sector-symbol relations, with optional filtering by sector or symbol.

Filters by `sector_name` to retrieve all symbols belonging to a sector, or by
`symbol` to retrieve all sectors a given symbol is classified under. Both filters
may be combined to narrow results. Soft-deleted records (``is_deleted=1``) are
excluded.

post.description:
Creates one or more sector-symbol relation records in a single request.

Accepts a list of relation definitions under `items`. Each item requires both
`symbol` and `sector_name`. Returns the count of successfully created records.

csv_id.title: Csv Id
csv_id.description: Row number or identifier of the record in the original imported CSV file. Useful for tracing back to raw data.

market.title: Market
market.description: The market where the index is traded.

locale.title: Locale
locale.description: Locale/region code of the market, e.g. 'us', 'cn', 'hk'. Often used to route to the correct exchange or timezone context.

primary_exchange.title: Primary Exchange
primary_exchange.description: The primary exchange where the index is traded.

type.title: Type
type.description: The type of the index (e.g. 'Equity', 'Fixed Income', etc.).

active.title: Active
active.description: Whether the index is currently active.

currency_name.title: Currency Name
currency_name.description: Trading / reporting currency of the instrument, e.g. 'USD', 'CNY', 'HKD'.

cik.title: Cik
cik.description: SEC Central Index Key (CIK) for US‑listed companies, used for linking to SEC filings. Empty for non‑US issuers.

composite_figi.title: Composite Figi
composite_figi.description: Bloomberg Composite FIGI for the instrument, representing the overall security across trading venues.

share_class_figi.title: Share Class Figi
share_class_figi.description: Bloomberg Share Class FIGI, identifying a specific share class of the security (if applicable).

last_updated_utc.title: Last Updated Utc
last_updated_utc.description: Timestamp in UTC when this metadata record was last updated in the system.

first_trade_date.title: First Trade Date
first_trade_date.description: Timestamp in UTC when this index was first traded.

source_feed.title: Source Feed
source_feed.description: Data source feed identifier for this index (e.g. vendor or channel name).

delisted_utc.title: Delisted Utc
delisted_utc.description: Timestamp in UTC when this index was delisted, if applicable.

ticker.title: Ticker
ticker.description: Unique ticker symbol of the security, used as the primary key. Example: 'AAPL', '000001.SZ'.

display_name.title: Display Name
display_name.description: Short, human‑readable display name for the security, often used in UIs. Example: 'Apple Inc.'.

city.title: City
city.description: City of the company’s registered address or main office.

state.title: State
state.description: State / province / region of the company’s registered address.

country.title: Country
country.description: Country of incorporation or primary operation, e.g. 'US', 'CN'.

address1.title: Address1
address1.description: First line of the company’s address (street, building, etc.).

industry.title: Industry
industry.description: Industry classification of the company, e.g. 'Software—Infrastructure', 'Banks—Regional'.

long_business_summary.title: Long Business Summary
long_business_summary.description: Free‑text long description of the company’s business operations and activities.

full_time_employees.title: Full Time Employees
full_time_employees.description: Approximate number of full‑time employees of the company.

quote_type.title: Quote Type
quote_type.description: Quote type/category from the data vendor, e.g. 'EQUITY', 'INDEX', 'ETF'. Used to distinguish how prices should be interpreted.

csv_id.title: Csv Id
csv_id.description: Row number or identifier of the record in the original imported CSV file. Useful for tracing back to raw data.

name.title: Name
name.description: Official name of the company or asset, typically longer and more formal than display_name.

market.title: Market
market.description: Market category of the instrument, such as 'stocks', 'crypto', 'indices'.

locale.title: Locale
locale.description: Locale/region code of the market, e.g. 'us', 'cn', 'hk'. Often used to route to the correct exchange or timezone context.

primary_exchange.title: Primary Exchange
primary_exchange.description: Code of the primary listing exchange, e.g. 'XNYS' (NYSE), 'XNAS' (NASDAQ).

type.title: Type
type.description: Instrument type code, e.g. 'CS' (common stock), 'ETF', 'INDEX'. Used to decide how to treat the asset in analytics.

active.title: Active
active.description: Whether the instrument is currently active/listed. False usually indicates delisted or inactive.

currency_name.title: Currency Name
currency_name.description: Trading / reporting currency of the instrument, e.g. 'USD', 'CNY', 'HKD'.

cik.title: Cik
cik.description: SEC Central Index Key (CIK) for US‑listed companies, used for linking to SEC filings. Empty for non‑US issuers.

composite_figi.title: Composite Figi
composite_figi.description: Bloomberg Composite FIGI for the instrument, representing the overall security across trading venues.

share_class_figi.title: Share Class Figi
share_class_figi.description: Bloomberg Share Class FIGI, identifying a specific share class of the security (if applicable).

last_updated_utc.title: Last Updated Utc
last_updated_utc.description: Timestamp in UTC when this metadata record was last updated in the system.

first_trade_date.title: First Trade Date
first_trade_date.description: Approximate first trade/listing date of the security in UTC, if known.

StockListQueryRequestSLZ.title: StockListQueryRequestSLZ
StockListQueryRequestSLZ.description: stock list query for any like quote/price/ticker info

event_date.title: Event Date
event_date.description: Timestamp of the shares event (e.g. end-of-period)

common_shares.title: Common Shares
common_shares.description: Number of common shares outstanding at event_date

StockSharesSLZ.title: StockSharesSLZ
StockSharesSLZ.description: Historical common shares outstanding for a given ticker.

symbol.title: Symbol
symbol.description: Requested ticker symbol; used to group all related financial data

fundamental_balance.title: Fundamental Balance
fundamental_balance.description: Normalized balance sheet fundamentals per (ticker, report_date, freq).

fundamental_cash_flow.title: Fundamental Cash Flow
fundamental_cash_flow.description: Normalized cash flow statement fundamentals per (ticker, report_date, freq).

stock_shares.title: Stock Shares
stock_shares.description: Event history of common shares outstanding for this ticker (used for share count, market cap, per-share metrics, etc.).

balance_sheet.title: Balance Sheet
balance_sheet.description: Raw SEC balance sheet filings for issuers whose CIK maps to this ticker. A single filing can be associated with multiple tickers via the tickers[] field.

cash_flow.title: Cash Flow
cash_flow.description: Raw SEC cash flow statement filings for issuers whose CIK maps to this ticker. Includes operating, investing, and financing cash flows.

income_statement.title: Income Statement
income_statement.description: Raw SEC income statement filings for issuers whose CIK maps to this ticker. Includes revenue, expenses, and earnings metrics.

StocksFinancialsPerSymbolSLZ.title: StocksFinancialsPerSymbolSLZ
StocksFinancialsPerSymbolSLZ.description: All financial datasets available for a single requested symbol.

bar_time.title: Bar Time
bar_time.description: Timestamp of the candlestick bar, marking the start of the time period

open.title: Open
open.description: Opening price at the start of the time period

high.title: High
high.description: Highest price reached during the time period

low.title: Low
low.description: Lowest price reached during the time period

close.title: Close
close.description: Closing price at the end of the time period

vol.title: Vol
vol.description: Trading volume during the time period

data.title: Data
data.description: List of time series candlestick data points, ordered chronologically

total_num.title: Total Num
total_num.description: Total number of data points available

data.title: Data
data.description: List of time series candlestick data points, ordered chronologically

total_num.title: Total Num
total_num.description: Total number of data points available

trough_time.title: Trough Time
trough_time.description: 最大回撤区间最小净值时间

user_id.title: User Id
user_id.description: Current user ID (required, obtained from upstream system/context). 当前用户 ID，用于标识用户身份

region.title: Region
region.description: User's primary trading market (e.g., 'CN', 'US', 'HK'), can be left empty if unknown. 用户主要交易市场，未知可留空

preference.title: Preference
preference.description: User investment preference configuration (e.g., risk preference, return target, holding period, etc.). Fill as needed. 用户投资偏好配置，按需填写

last_active_time.title: Last Active Time
last_active_time.description: User's most recent active time (ISO 8601 format). Fill if recent active time is available, otherwise leave empty. 用户最近活跃时间，如有则填写

last_transactions.title: Last Transactions
last_transactions.description: User's recent transaction records (e.g., recent N transactions including symbols, amounts, time, etc.). Fill as needed. 用户最近交易记录，按需填写

as_of_date.title: As Of Date
as_of_date.description: Profile date (YYYY-MM-DD format), typically fill with today or leave empty for default. 画像日期，通常填今天或留空使用默认值

UserTraitsRequestSLZ.title: UserTraitsRequestSLZ
UserTraitsRequestSLZ.description:
用户画像请求参数

用于查询或更新用户画像数据，包括投资偏好、风险承受能力、资金量级等信息。
